arts.ttl: Nico Williams: Why Barcelona have snubbed Arsenal & Chelsea target
arts.sum: Nico Williams is once again expected to generate extensive transfer interest this summer.

arts.ttl: Rangers told it will take YEARS to catch Celtic as 49ers takeover met with brutal reality check
arts.sum: The Ibrox club are on course for another season in Celtic's shadow but still have a glimmer of hope in the Europa League

arts.ttl: Gio Reyna a Rangers 'transfer target' as Borussia Dortmund star could follow in footsteps of Ibrox hero dad
arts.sum: The USA star is only a bit part player at Dortmund and could reportedly move on this summer - with Gers among a number of teams interested

arts.ttl: Ianis Hagi knows he isn't a Rangers priority as club 'power' has him believing they can blast Bilbao
arts.sum: The Romanian insists he isn't concerned about his own future as he prepares to put his 'body on the line' in Europa League clash

arts.ttl: 'Cerny is a bullet' – Flying Rangers star gets Athletic Bilbao anxious as boss namechecks 2 Ibrox stars he's wary of
arts.sum: Ernesto Valverde knows Cerny may well pack the punch that could send end their dreams of winning the Europa League on home turf

arts.ttl: Limping Bilbao star throws Rangers preparation into chaos as Athletic boss raises 'doubt' over 2 key men
arts.sum: Athletic could be without 11-goal Inaki Williams as well as defender Yuri Berchiche for the home leg

arts.ttl: Celtic and Rangers join race to sign Crystal Palace man who is high in demand
arts.sum: Crystal Palace players are high in demand ahead of the summer transfer window. Eberechi Eze could be on his way out of the club after Manchester United are showing serious interest in signing him this summer. Along with Eze, centre-back Marc Guehi, who has been the club’s most consistent performer for a very long time, […] The post Celtic and Rangers join race to sign Crystal Palace man who is high in demand appeared first on CaughtOffside.

arts.ttl: It's Celtic who owe Rangers a guard of honour as Hotline keeps the receipts in 51 year wait for payback
arts.sum: Ross Pilcher took your calls as Vaclav Cerny asked to make amends and Paul Hartley is told to sober up

arts.ttl: Kris Boyd shuts down Rangers myth about Jack Butland as he warns Barry Ferguson what he CAN'T do in Bilbao
arts.sum: Boyd doesn't reckon Butland is 'done' despite Barry Ferguson's gutsy call to drop him

arts.ttl: Rangers fans warned against 'violence and vandalism' as Bilbao ramps up security for largest EVER away support
arts.sum: Around 5,000 Rangers fans are expected in the Basque region and it'll be the largest visiting support Bilbao have seen in Europe
